rules.title: Be respectful and civil
rules.description: Treat all users with respect. No personal attacks, harassment, or hate speech.

rules.title: No spam or excessive self-promotion
rules.description: Limit self-promotion to appropriate contexts. Follow the 10:1 rule (10 non-promotional posts for every 1 promotional post).

rules.title: Follow Reddit's content policy
rules.description: All content must comply with Reddit's site-wide rules and content policy.

rules.title: Use appropriate post flair
rules.description: Tag your posts with relevant flairs to help organize content.

rules.title: No low-effort content
rules.description: Posts should contribute meaningfully to the community discussion.
